title: Class Hierarchy (Full)
name: Class Hierarchy (Full)
description: All current ontology classes and their subclass_of relationships forming the full class hierarchy.
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parents = (
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN { parent: v.label, parent_key: v._key }
  )
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    parents: parents
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parents = (
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN { parent: v.label, parent_key: v._key }
  )
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    parents: parents
  }

title: Top-Level Classes
name: Top-Level Classes
description: Current classes with no parent (no outgoing subclass_of edges). These are root classes in the hierarchy.
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parent_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER parent_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    description: cls.description
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET parent_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 OUTBOUND cls subclass_of
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER parent_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    description: cls.description
  }

title: Orphan Classes
name: Orphan Classes
description: Current classes with no current edges at all — neither subclass_of, has_property, nor related_to.
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET edge_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY cls subclass_of, has_property, related_to, equivalent_class, extends_domain
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      LIMIT 1
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER edge_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    confidence: cls.confidence
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET edge_count = LENGTH(
    FOR v, e IN 1..1 ANY cls subclass_of, has_property, related_to, equivalent_class, extends_domain
      FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
      LIMIT 1
      RETURN 1
  )
  FILTER edge_count == 0
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    confidence: cls.confidence
  }

title: Cross-Tier Relationships
name: Cross-Tier Relationships
description: All current extends_domain edges showing how local (Tier 2) classes link to domain (Tier 1) classes.
content:
FOR e IN extends_domain
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET local_cls = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET domain_cls = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  RETURN {
    local_key: local_cls._key,
    local_label: local_cls.label,
    local_ontology: local_cls.ontology_id,
    domain_key: domain_cls._key,
    domain_label: domain_cls.label,
    domain_ontology: domain_cls.ontology_id,
    created: e.created
  }
value:
FOR e IN extends_domain
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET local_cls = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET domain_cls = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  RETURN {
    local_key: local_cls._key,
    local_label: local_cls.label,
    local_ontology: local_cls.ontology_id,
    domain_key: domain_cls._key,
    domain_label: domain_cls.label,
    domain_ontology: domain_cls.ontology_id,
    created: e.created
  }

title: Low Confidence Entities
name: Low Confidence Entities
description: Current classes and properties with confidence scores below 0.5, sorted by confidence ascending.
content:
LET low_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.confidence != null AND cls.confidence < 0.5
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, uri: cls.uri, confidence: cls.confidence, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET low_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.confidence != null AND prop.confidence < 0.5
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, uri: prop.uri, confidence: prop.confidence, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(low_classes, low_props)
  SORT entity.confidence ASC
  RETURN entity
value:
LET low_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.confidence != null AND cls.confidence < 0.5
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, uri: cls.uri, confidence: cls.confidence, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET low_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.confidence != null AND prop.confidence < 0.5
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, uri: prop.uri, confidence: prop.confidence, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(low_classes, low_props)
  SORT entity.confidence ASC
  RETURN entity

title: Recently Created
name: Recently Created
description: Entities created in the last 24 hours (based on the created timestamp).
content:
LET cutoff = DATE_SUBTRACT(DATE_NOW(), 1, 'day')
LET cutoff_ts = DATE_TIMESTAMP(cutoff) / 1000
LET recent_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, uri: cls.uri, created: cls.created, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET recent_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, uri: prop.uri, created: prop.created, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(recent_classes, recent_props)
  SORT entity.created DESC
  RETURN entity
value:
LET cutoff = DATE_SUBTRACT(DATE_NOW(), 1, 'day')
LET cutoff_ts = DATE_TIMESTAMP(cutoff) / 1000
LET recent_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, uri: cls.uri, created: cls.created, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id }
)
LET recent_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.created >= cutoff_ts
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, uri: prop.uri, created: prop.created, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(recent_classes, recent_props)
  SORT entity.created DESC
  RETURN entity

title: Properties by Domain
name: Properties by Domain
description: Group current properties by their domain class via has_property edges.
content:
FOR e IN has_property
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET domain_cls = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET prop = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  FILTER domain_cls != null AND prop != null
  COLLECT domain_label = domain_cls.label, domain_key = domain_cls._key INTO props
  RETURN {
    domain_class: domain_label,
    domain_key: domain_key,
    properties: props[*].prop.label,
    property_count: LENGTH(props)
  }
value:
FOR e IN has_property
  FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
  LET domain_cls = DOCUMENT(e._from)
  LET prop = DOCUMENT(e._to)
  FILTER domain_cls != null AND prop != null
  COLLECT domain_label = domain_cls.label, domain_key = domain_cls._key INTO props
  RETURN {
    domain_class: domain_label,
    domain_key: domain_key,
    properties: props[*].prop.label,
    property_count: LENGTH(props)
  }

title: Ontology Statistics
name: Ontology Statistics
description: Summary statistics: count of current classes, properties, and edges grouped by ontology.
content:
LET class_counts = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    COLLECT ontology = cls.ontology_id WITH COUNT INTO cnt
    RETURN { ontology, class_count: cnt }
)
LET prop_counts = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    COLLECT ontology = prop.ontology_id WITH COUNT INTO cnt
    RETURN { ontology, property_count: cnt }
)
LET edge_counts = (
  FOR e IN subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    COLLECT ontology = e.ontology_id WITH COUNT INTO cnt
    RETURN { ontology, subclass_edge_count: cnt }
)
FOR cc IN class_counts
  LET pc = FIRST(FOR p IN prop_counts FILTER p.ontology == cc.ontology RETURN p)
  LET ec = FIRST(FOR e IN edge_counts FILTER e.ontology == cc.ontology RETURN e)
  RETURN {
    ontology_id: cc.ontology,
    classes: cc.class_count,
    properties: pc ? pc.property_count : 0,
    subclass_edges: ec ? ec.subclass_edge_count : 0
  }
value:
LET class_counts = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    COLLECT ontology = cls.ontology_id WITH COUNT INTO cnt
    RETURN { ontology, class_count: cnt }
)
LET prop_counts = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    COLLECT ontology = prop.ontology_id WITH COUNT INTO cnt
    RETURN { ontology, property_count: cnt }
)
LET edge_counts = (
  FOR e IN subclass_of
    FILTER e.expired == 9223372036854775807
    COLLECT ontology = e.ontology_id WITH COUNT INTO cnt
    RETURN { ontology, subclass_edge_count: cnt }
)
FOR cc IN class_counts
  LET pc = FIRST(FOR p IN prop_counts FILTER p.ontology == cc.ontology RETURN p)
  LET ec = FIRST(FOR e IN edge_counts FILTER e.ontology == cc.ontology RETURN e)
  RETURN {
    ontology_id: cc.ontology,
    classes: cc.class_count,
    properties: pc ? pc.property_count : 0,
    subclass_edges: ec ? ec.subclass_edge_count : 0
  }

title: Temporal Snapshot at Date
name: Temporal Snapshot at Date
description: Parameterized: all ontology classes active at the given @timestamp (created <= @timestamp AND expired > @timestamp).
content:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.created <= @timestamp AND cls.expired > @timestamp
  SORT cls.label ASC
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    created: cls.created,
    expired: cls.expired
  }
value:
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.created <= @timestamp AND cls.expired > @timestamp
  SORT cls.label ASC
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    ontology_id: cls.ontology_id,
    created: cls.created,
    expired: cls.expired
  }

title: Version History for Class
name: Version History for Class
description: Parameterized: all versions of a class identified by @class_key, sorted by created timestamp descending.
content:
LET target = DOCUMENT(CONCAT('ontology_classes/', @class_key))
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.uri == target.uri
  SORT cls.created DESC
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    description: cls.description,
    created: cls.created,
    expired: cls.expired,
    is_current: cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  }
value:
LET target = DOCUMENT(CONCAT('ontology_classes/', @class_key))
FOR cls IN ontology_classes
  FILTER cls.uri == target.uri
  SORT cls.created DESC
  RETURN {
    _key: cls._key,
    label: cls.label,
    uri: cls.uri,
    description: cls.description,
    created: cls.created,
    expired: cls.expired,
    is_current: cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
  }

title: Pending Curation
name: Pending Curation
description: Current entities with status 'pending' in staging graphs awaiting human review.
content:
LET pending_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.status == 'pending'
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, uri: cls.uri, confidence: cls.confidence, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id, created: cls.created }
)
LET pending_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.status == 'pending'
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, uri: prop.uri, confidence: prop.confidence, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id, created: prop.created }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(pending_classes, pending_props)
  SORT entity.created DESC
  RETURN entity
value:
LET pending_classes = (
  FOR cls IN ontology_classes
    FILTER cls.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER cls.status == 'pending'
    RETURN { type: 'class', _key: cls._key, label: cls.label, uri: cls.uri, confidence: cls.confidence, ontology_id: cls.ontology_id, created: cls.created }
)
LET pending_props = (
  FOR prop IN ontology_properties
    FILTER prop.expired == 9223372036854775807
    FILTER prop.status == 'pending'
    RETURN { type: 'property', _key: prop._key, label: prop.label, uri: prop.uri, confidence: prop.confidence, ontology_id: prop.ontology_id, created: prop.created }
)
FOR entity IN UNION(pending_classes, pending_props)
  SORT entity.created DESC
  RETURN entity
